Hi Paul,

We wanted to share a full update on everything we have in motion right now for 389 Grove Street. The new price is reflected everywhere and we've already pushed out a wave of marketing activity across social, luxury platforms, and local channels.

Social Media

Every post is tagged with our local Coldwell Banker offices and CB Global Luxury for maximum visibility across all audiences.
